utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items required in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check completeness per item: (1) property: includes selected property details and price (name, location, bedrooms, size, features, condition, school access, price, viewing_date) — fully specified. (2) financing: includes financing solution with terms (mortgage type, amount, monthly payment, arrangement fee, equity used, approval timeline) — fully specified, though LTV calculation seems inconsistent, but terms are present. (3) legal_services: law firm, contact, service, cost, timeline — fully specified. (4) moving_services: company, contact, service, cost, scheduled_date, includes — fully specified. (5) setup_services: utility and setup services — includes property survey details and utilities package with provider, cost, inclusions, timelines — fully specified. (6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown — includes line items and totals and remaining budget — fully specified. Therefore, 6/6 items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that correspond to items in the ground-truth ratings: purchase property 'Family House'; financing 'Traditional Mortgage'; legal services 'Basic Legal Package'; moving services 'Standard Moving'; property survey 'Full Structural Survey'; utilities 'Premium Utilities'. I mapped each named item directly to its rating from the provided ground-truth.
